name: INSEE Enrichment for Agile CRM

nodes.name: Sticky Note

parameters.content:
### Enrich CRM data with data from French INSEE OpenDatabase API
This workflow takes all company entries from **Agile CRM** and enriches their data using the French [Insee Opendata API]({{ $env.API_BASE_URL }} (Free Access)

__This will update :__ 
1) Official Address of the company headquarters
2) Add government company id number (SIREN) in a Custom Field

nodes.notes: This stickyNote node performs automated tasks as part of the workflow.

nodes.name: FilterOut all Company that have the ReadOnly Key set
nodes.notes: This code node performs automated tasks as part of the workflow.

nodes.name: Sticky Note1

parameters.content:
### 👨‍🎤 Setup
1. Add your **Agile CRM** credentials
2. Link each AgileCRM node to the correct **Agile CRM** credentials
3. Add your **INSEE** API Key to the **"Set Insee API Key"** node
4. Make sure the **Custom Fields** for the **companies** are set as below (Admin Settings):
   - Label : "SIREN", Type : "Text Field", Description "N° de SIREN"
   - Label : "RO", Type : "Number", Description "Locks entry from update"
5. Click on **Test Workflow** to make sure everything is working
6. Configure schedule if needed and don't forget to change status to **Active**

nodes.notes: This stickyNote node performs automated tasks as part of the workflow.

nodes.name: Sticky Note3

parameters.content:
### 🗒️ Notes : 
1. This workflow is made to write over any entry already present. You can change this for each company by setting the **"RO"** Custom Field to **1**, making it read-only for this workflow.

2. If you want to make it readonly after the update from this workflow, then **add a custom property** in the last node **Enrich CRM with INSEE Data** named **"RO"**, SubType **"Number"** and Value **"1"**

parameters.content:
### Enrich CRM data with data from French INSEE OpenDatabase API
This workflow takes all company entries from **Agile CRM** and enriches their data using the French [Insee Opendata API]({{ $env.API_BASE_URL }} (Free Access)

__This will update :__ 
1) Official Address of the company headquarters
2) Add government company id number (SIREN) in a Custom Field

### 👨‍🎤 Setup
1. Add your **Agile CRM** credentials
2. Link each AgileCRM node to the correct **Agile CRM** credentials
3. Add your **INSEE** API Key to the **"Set Insee API Key"** node
4. Make sure the **Custom Fields** for the **companies** are set as below (Admin Settings):
   - Label : "SIREN", Type : "Text Field", Description "N° de SIREN"
   - Label : "RO", Type : "Number", Description "Locks entry from update"
5. Click on **Test Workflow** to make sure everything is working
6. Configure schedule if needed and don't forget to change status to **Active**
👆 You can use any of those two Trigger to start the process.

### 🗒️ Notes : 
1. This workflow is made to write over any entry already present. You can change this for each company by setting the **"RO"** Custom Field to **1**, making it read-only for this workflow.

2. If you want to make it readonly after the update from this workflow, then **add a custom property** in the last node **Enrich CRM with INSEE Data** named **"RO"**, SubType **"Number"** and Value **"1"**

prerequisites: An active n8n instance installed locally, in a Docker container, or hosted on n8n Cloud.
Basic familiarity with importing JSON templates in n8n.
setupInstructions: Download the JSON configuration for this workflow.
Ensure you set up credentials for all connected integrations.
Test your trigger and run execution.
requiredCredentials: agile Crm  A P I details
configurationSteps: Verify the settings of the trigger node "When clicking ‘Test workflow’".
Adjust the execution intervals (e.g., Every hour, Daily, or Custom CRON expression) according to your preferences.
Open the "Find Company in SIREN database" node (n8n-nodes-base.httpRequest) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Request all data from SIREN database" node (n8n-nodes-base.httpRequest) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Sticky Note" node (n8n-nodes-base.stickyNote) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Sticky Note1" node (n8n-nodes-base.stickyNote) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "clean_route" node (n8n-nodes-base.noOp) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Get all Compagnies from Agile CRM" node (n8n-nodes-base.agileCrm) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Enrich CRM with INSEE Data" node (n8n-nodes-base.agileCrm) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Merge data from CRM and SIREN database with enriched for the CRM" node (n8n-nodes-base.merge) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Sticky Note2" node (n8n-nodes-base.stickyNote) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Open the "Sticky Note3" node (n8n-nodes-base.stickyNote) and configure the action parameters, mappings, and fields.
Locate the Set/Edit fields node "Set Insee API Key".
Define or edit values for variables that are referenced in downstream nodes.
testingSteps: Click the "Test step" or "Listen for test event" button on your Trigger node.
Send a test trigger from your source service (e.g. fill a test form or trigger a webhook trigger).
Verify that the node canvas lights up green, indicating successful data flow.
Open the final destination node to confirm that output records were saved correctly.
instructions.expectedResult: Upon trigger activation, inputs will flow through the configured nodes and execute actions successfully.
troubleshooting: Check credential warning symbols. Most workflow issues stem from expired OAuth connections or missing API permissions.
Verify that the data keys coming from your Trigger node match the exact names mapped in subsequent nodes (e.g., {{ $json.body.email }}).
Open the Execution history tab in n8n to view logs and determine which node failed.
securityNotes: Never hardcode API keys, passwords, or authentication bearer tokens in the plain text fields of node parameters.
If you download or share this workflow JSON, sanitize any sensitive parameters or configuration nodes.
customizationIdeas: Add an email node at the end to notify you of successful executions.
Incorporate an AI LLM node to summarize trigger payloads before writing them to integrations.
